summary: Solid PowerShell implementation with correct use of Set-StrictMode, -LiteralPath, error handling, and structured output markers. Workflow correctly uses `shell: pwsh` and least-privilege permissions. CRITICAL ISSUE: `actions/checkout@v4` violates pinning requirement—must be pinned to full-length commit SHA (40 hex), not major version tag. Matrix generation logic (cartesian product, exclude/include rules, size validation) appears sound. Good modularity with helper functions. Structured markers (MATRIX_OK/FAIL) enable reliable output parsing for test harness.
